argument_substitution.mechanism: argument-hint frontmatter field documents expected arguments; user-supplied arguments are appended to the command body at invocation time

builtin_commands.mechanism: Roo Code commands are user-defined Markdown files in .roo/commands/ — no user-overridable built-in slash-command layer documented

providerExtensions.name: Markdown command file format
providerExtensions.summary: Custom commands are .md files in .roo/commands/ (project) or ~/.roo/commands/ (global); the filename (minus extension) becomes the slash command name.

providerExtensions.name: description frontmatter field
providerExtensions.summary: Optional one-line description in YAML frontmatter is shown in the command picker and /help menu.

providerExtensions.name: argument-hint frontmatter field
providerExtensions.summary: Optional argument-hint field documents the expected argument shape for the command in the picker UI.

providerExtensions.name: mode frontmatter field
providerExtensions.summary: Optional mode field binds the command to a specific Roo Code mode (built-in or custom) so it is surfaced only when that mode is active.

providerExtensions.name: Filename-as-command-name
providerExtensions.summary: The Markdown filename (without extension) is the slash command name — /commit.md on disk becomes /commit in the CLI.
